description: Public GitHub repository, release, search, and security advisory signals for agent research.

novel_features.name: Repository trend discovery
novel_features.description: Find recently active repositories by language/topic using GitHub search qualifiers.

novel_features.name: Release velocity
novel_features.description: List recent releases for an owner/repo with since filtering.

novel_features.name: Advisory briefing
novel_features.description: Brief security advisories by ecosystem, package, severity, and freshness.

novel_features.name: Repository health comparison
novel_features.description: Compare repository adoption, activity, issue load, and latest release signals.
